---
name: Add a new language
about: I want to add support for a new language or dialect
title: "[LANGUAGE] Add support for <language name>"
labels: data, good-first-issue
assignees: ''
---

## Language details

- **Language name:**
- **ISO 639-3 code (if it has one):** (look it up at https://iso639-3.sil.org)
- **Script/writing system:** (e.g. Latin, Devanagari, Arabic, Cyrillic)
- **Region spoken in:**
- **Approximate number of speakers:**

## Data availability

<!-- Tell us about the data you have or plan to collect -->

- **Do you have a parallel corpus?** (parallel = sentences in both languages, aligned)
  - [ ] Yes, I have one ready
  - [ ] I am collecting one
  - [ ] I need help finding one

- **Approximate size of corpus:**
  (e.g. 5,000 sentence pairs, 50,000 sentence pairs)

- **Source of the data:**
  (e.g. university research, government documents, community contribution, personal collection)

## Are you able to review translations?

We need at least one native or fluent speaker to review outputs.

- [ ] Yes, I can review translations
- [ ] I can find someone who can

## Anything else?

<!-- Special characters, tone marks, dialects, or anything we should know about this language -->
